title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
We at Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies are looking for an experienced Senior Doctor based out of Delhi. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies:
Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual performance appraisal
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sun Pharmaceutical Digital Technologies!
